data.title: Binance has launched a Plasma deposit airdrop. Deposit $100,000 to receive 11,489 XPL.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, the deposit airdrop event jointly held by Binance and Plasma has now distributed rewards. A single account that deposits $100,000 can obtain 11,489 XPL, which is approximately $8,513 at the current price.

data.title: ECB's Villeroy: Europe risks falling behind US in stablecoins
data.description: Francois Villeroy de Galhau, a member of the European Central Bank's Governing Council, stated in an interview with Continental Weekly that European banks risk falling behind the United States in the rapid development of stablecoins, potentially undermining the continent's sovereignty. He noted that Europe leads in regulation and public digital currency development, but lags behind in the private sector. He added that the stablecoin market could grow from approximately $250 billion to trillions of dollars in the coming years, forcing European banks to address the demand for private tokenized currencies. He emphasized that Europe could face risks from private dollar-denominated stablecoins issued by non-European parties, which are near-currencies. While discussions on this topic are still in their infancy, they are crucial for Europe's future sovereignty. (Bloomberg)

data.title: ETH price hits BitMNR cost line, $400 away from SharpLink cost line of $3603
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, the ETH price has now reached BitMNR's cost line of 2.416 million ETH (worth $9.7 billion), while SharpLink Gaming's cost line of 838,000 ETH (worth $3.36 billion) (cost price of $3,603) is still $400 away.

data.title: Binance Alpha: Plasma (XPL) Phase 1 airdrop starts with a minimum claim of 200 Alpha Points
data.description: According to an official announcement, Binance Alpha is the first platform to list Plasma (XPL). Trading on Alpha will begin at 7:00 PM (UTC+8) on September 25, 2025. Eligible Binance users can use Binance Alpha Points to claim an airdrop of 180 XPL tokens within 24 hours of the start of trading on the Alpha event page. The Binance Alpha airdrop will be distributed in two phases: Phase 1 (first 18 hours): Users with at least 200 Alpha Points will be eligible to claim. Phase 2 (last 6 hours): Users with at least 100 Alpha Points will be eligible to participate in the second phase of the airdrop on a first-come, first-served basis. The score threshold will automatically decrease by 15 points every hour while the event continues. Please note that claiming the airdrop will cost 15 Binance Alpha Points. Users must confirm their claim within 24 hours on the Alpha event page; otherwise, they will forfeit the airdrop.

data.title: CertiK Announces Participation in Singapore’s Token2049 as a Silver Sponsor
data.description: Token 2049 is about to kick off, and security company CertiK has announced that it will attend the conference as a Silver Sponsor. Through joint events and technical demonstrations, the event aims to deepen industry security collaboration and technological exploration. During Token 2049, CertiK will co-host an exclusive event, "Oceanic Night@TOKEN 2049," with Kraken, EVG, and Hedera. The evening will bring together industry leaders and ecosystem builders, highlighting Kraken's IPO and crypto innovations while providing a platform for in-depth exchanges and fostering cutting-edge conversations. Furthermore, CertiK and CrossBar will showcase Enhanced Multi-Party Secure Computation (EMPC) and open source hardware technologies at their booth (PB 4-27). The two parties will discuss the challenges and compliance paths facing crypto security, as well as how open source hardware can provide users with a truly transparent experience. As a security service provider serving over 5,000 companies and protecting $600 billion in assets, CertiK's appearance at this event is seen as an important signal of collaboration within the industry's security ecosystem, and also injects a key security perspective into this world-leading Web 3 event.

data.title: Crypto News Today: Ether Slides Toward $4K, Bitcoin and XRP Drop as U.S. Shutdown Risks Rise
data.description: Key Takeaways:Ether (ETH) dropped over 3% to nearly $4,000, leading crypto losses in Asia.Bitcoin (BTC) slipped below $112,000, while XRP, SOL, and DOGE fell between 2–3%.Polymarket traders now price a 77% chance of a U.S. government shutdown by year-end, with a 63% chance by Oct. 1.The White House is preparing for large-scale job cuts if Congress fails to pass a funding bill.Cryptocurrencies fell on Thursday as traders reacted to rising odds of a U.S. government shutdown and cautious signals from the Federal Reserve.Ether (ETH) led the drop, falling more than 3% to $4,037, nearly testing the $4,000 mark for the first time since early August. Bitcoin (BTC) slipped over 1% to $111,839, while XRP, Solana (SOL), and Dogecoin (DOGE) each shed 2–3%. SOL was on track to break below the key $200 level.The CoinDesk 20 Index was down 2% at 3,940 points, while U.S. stock futures traded flat to slightly positive.Shutdown Odds SurgePrediction market Polymarket showed a sharp rise in shutdown probabilities, with “Yes” contracts pricing a 77% chance of a U.S. government shutdown by Dec. 31 — the highest since the market opened in January. Odds of a shutdown by Oct. 1 stood at 63%.The White House Office of Management and Budget instructed agencies to prepare for furloughs and staff cuts if Congress cannot pass a spending measure before the end of September. Lawmakers must either approve a continuing resolution or pass all 12 annual funding bills, which is unlikely before the deadline.Fed Uncertainty Adds PressureMarkets also weighed comments from San Francisco Fed President Mary Daly, who reiterated support for further interest rate cuts but declined to provide a timeline.The Fed cut rates by 25 basis points on Sept. 17 and signaled the possibility of two more cuts this year. However, Chair Jerome Powell and other policymakers have emphasized a data-dependent approach, keeping traders cautious.Seven Fed officials, including New York Fed President John Williams, are scheduled to speak on Thursday, with markets awaiting Friday’s PCE inflation data — the Fed’s preferred measure of inflation.According to QCP Capital, if inflation pressures remain contained, “markets may interpret this as room for further Fed cuts, providing liquidity tailwinds into Q4. That could be the catalyst for BTC to attempt a long-anticipated breakout.”

data.title: Potential Delay in U.S. Nonfarm Payroll Data Due to Government Shutdown
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the release of the U.S. nonfarm payroll data for September, originally scheduled for October 3, may be postponed due to a government shutdown. The foreign exchange options market has already adjusted its pricing in anticipation of this delay.

October 10 and October 17 are considered the most likely dates for the data release if postponed, as demand for options expiring on these dates has increased. October 10 is particularly noteworthy, attracting the highest demand and additional volatility risk premiums. This demand and premium stand out in the current environment of very low exchange rate volatility.

data.title: GOAT Network announced the establishment of the GOAT Foundation and will soon launch TGE
data.description: Bitcoin yield farming protocol GOAT Network has announced the establishment of the GOAT Foundation and will soon conduct a Time General Evolution (TGE) for its GOATED token.

data.title: NBA star Thompson: Will not issue tokens, predicts Bitcoin will reach $150,000 by the end of the year
data.description: NBA star Tristan Thompson stated in an interview that he will not issue a personal token or other cryptocurrency, stating that he will remain in the cryptocurrency space for the long term and is currently building a personal cryptocurrency portfolio. He also predicted that Bitcoin will reach $150,000 by the end of the year. Earlier news broke that NBA star Tristan Thompson would launch basketball.fun, a player tokenization platform.

data.title: Binance Square Launches Holoworld AI Token Reward Campaign
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, a new campaign on CreatorPad is set to offer 255,600 Holoworld AI (HOLO) token voucher rewards to verified users who complete specific tasks. CreatorPad, a platform on Binance Square, allows users to earn token rewards by engaging in various activities. The campaign will run from 2025-09-25 09:00 (UTC) to 2025-10-27 9:00 (UTC).

The campaign introduces a Mindshare Leaderboard, launched on 2025-07-17, which evaluates users based on the quality and consistency of their content. Verified Binance users can participate by completing tasks to unlock a share of 230,040 HOLO in token vouchers. Additionally, 25,560 HOLO token vouchers are reserved for the top 50 creators on the Square Creator Leaderboard, determined by the 7-day rankings at the campaign's start.

Participants must complete three tasks to qualify for the reward pool. Task 1 involves creating content on Binance Square with specific criteria, including a minimum of 100 characters about Holoworld AI, using designated hashtags, and mentioning the project's account. Task 2 requires following the project's account on Binance Square and X. Task 3 involves trading a minimum of $10 in HOLO through spot, futures, or convert transactions.

The rewards are distributed based on the leaderboard results at the campaign's end. The top 100 creators on the Holoworld AI 30D Project Leaderboard will share 178,920 HOLO, while remaining participants will share 51,120 HOLO. An additional 25,560 HOLO is allocated for the top 50 creators on the Square Creator Leaderboard, divided into three ranking groups. Participants must adhere to Binance's guidelines and maintain their posts for 60 days post-campaign to remain eligible for rewards.

data.title: Tokenized Stocks on Ethereum Surge to $275M in September
data.description: Key Takeaways:The value of tokenized stocks on Ethereum climbed to $275 million in September, according to Messari.The milestone underscores Ethereum’s growing role in real-world asset (RWA) tokenization.Institutional and DeFi demand for on-chain equities continues to accelerate.The market value of tokenized stocks on Ethereum surged to $275 million in September, according to data shared by Messari. The sharp rise reflects Ethereum’s expanding role as the leading blockchain for real-world asset (RWA) tokenization, particularly equities.Tokenized stocks allow investors to gain exposure to traditional equity markets directly on-chain, combining 24/7 trading access with the benefits of blockchain settlement. Analysts note that the increase highlights growing institutional adoption and the push by decentralized finance (DeFi) protocols to bridge traditional markets with blockchain infrastructure.The latest milestone comes as tokenized assets—including bonds, treasuries, and real estate—continue to attract capital, with Ethereum serving as the dominant platform for issuance.

data.title: Binance Alpha to List ChainOpera AI (COAI) With Airdrop for Eligible Users
data.description: Key Takeaways:Binance Alpha will open trading for ChainOpera AI (COAI) on Sept. 25, 2025, at 15:00 (UTC+8).Users holding at least 200 Alpha Points can claim a 250 COAI token airdrop.The threshold will drop by 15 points every hour until the promotion ends.Binance Alpha announced it will list ChainOpera AI (COAI), with trading set to start at 15:00 (UTC+8) on September 25, 2025.To celebrate the launch, eligible users can claim a 250 COAI airdrop on a first-come, first-served basis through the Binance Alpha event page. The campaign starts with a 200 Alpha Points threshold, which will automatically decrease by 15 points every hour until the event concludes.

data.title: Global gold ETFs increased their holdings by 27 tons last Friday, the largest single-day increase since January 2022
data.description: The Kobeissi Letter, in a post on the X platform, reported that global gold ETF holdings increased by 27 tons last Friday, the largest single-day increase since January 2022 and double the average daily increase so far this year. Gold ETF holdings rose 0.9% in a single day, the largest single-day percentage gain since 2022. Gold prices are on track for their sixth consecutive week of gains, their longest winning streak since February. Furthermore, daily trading volume in the largest silver ETF, Silver Leveraged Lottery (SLV), surged to 1.2 million contracts last Friday, the highest level since April 2024.

data.title: Abraxas Capital Increases Short Positions on Aster
data.description: According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, HyperInsight monitoring reveals that in the past two hours, the address labeled as Abraxas Capital (0xb83) has significantly increased its short positions on Aster, accumulating over 2 million units. The trading preferences of this address closely align with its main address, with a total holding of approximately $404 million and an unrealized profit of around $9.46 million. Currently, all positions are short, with this week's profits reaching about $54.31 million. The primary short positions include approximately $146 million in ETH, another $110 million in ETH, and around $49.5 million in SOL.
